ddls:
CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the donor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the donor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the donor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the donor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the donor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the donor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the donor */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the donor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the donor registered with the center */,
  "last_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donor's last donation */,
  "donor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the donor (e.g., active, lapsed) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the donor */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the donor */,
  "next_scheduled_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donor's next scheduled donation */,
  "donation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of donations (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "donation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of donations made by the donor */,
  "total_donated_amount" REAL /* Total amount of blood donated by the donor */,
  "last_engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the last engagement with the donor */,
  "privacy_preferences" TEXT /* Donor's preferences regarding data privacy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_records" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor who made the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donation */,
  "donation_amount" REAL /* Amount of blood donated (in cubic centimeters) */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., whole blood, plasma) */,
  "donation_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation center where the donation was made */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., completed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "donation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the donation process */,
  "donation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the donation */,
  "donation_engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement during the donation (e.g., in-person, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_records_donation_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_center_id") REFERENCES donation_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_records_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the donation center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the donation center */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the donation center */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the donation center */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the donation center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the donation center */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the donation center */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the donation center */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the donation center's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the donation center's location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of donors that can be handled at a time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_donors" INTEGER /* Target number of donors for the campaign */,
  "target_donations" INTEGER /* Target number of donations for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed, cancelled) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "actual_donors" INTEGER /* Actual number of donors who participated in the campaign */,
  "actual_donations" INTEGER /* Actual number of donations made during the campaign */,
  "campaign_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_target_donations FOREIGN KEY ("target_donations") REFERENCES donation_records ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_target_donors FOREIGN KEY ("target_donors") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_donors" (
  "campaign_donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-donor link */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donor's participation in the campaign (e.g., confirmed, pending, declined) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of engagement activities with the donor during the campaign */,
  "donation_count" INTEGER /* Number of donations made by the donor during the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_donors_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_donors_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement activity */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., email, phone call, in-person visit) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_details" TEXT /* Details of the engagement activity */,
  "engagement_channel" TEXT /* Channel of engagement (e.g., email, phone, social media) */,
  "engagement_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the engagement (e.g., scheduled donation, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_engagement_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, SMS, mail) */,
  "communication_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of communication (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "preferred_donation_type" TEXT /* Preferred type of donation (e.g., whole blood, plasma) */,
  "preferred_donation_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred donation center */,
  "preferred_engagement_time" TEXT /* Preferred time of day for engagement */,
  "preferred_engagement_channel" TEXT /* Preferred channel of engagement (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_preferences_preferred_donation_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_donation_center_id") REFERENCES donation_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_preferences_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for segment membership (e.g., recency, frequency, monetary value) */,
  "segment_size" INTEGER /* Number of donors in the segment */,
  "segment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_segment_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment assignment */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the donor was assigned to the segment */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for assigning the donor to the segment (e.g., based on recency, frequency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_segment_assignments_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_segment_assignments_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES donor_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_donation_likelihood" REAL /* Likelihood of the donor making a future donation (0-1) */,
  "predicted_donation_amount" REAL /* Predicted amount of blood the donor will donate (in cubic centimeters) */,
  "predicted_donation_date" TEXT /* Predicted date of the next donation */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction (e.g., machine learning model, statistical model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_predictions_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., database, API, file) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the data source */,
  "source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "report_owner" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report (e.g., management, research team) */,
  "report_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the report (e.g., statistical analysis, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_report_file_path FOREIGN KEY ("report_file_path") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_url")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
